problems.detail: Parameter 'γ' (distance discount factor) is used in Eq. 1 (impulsive policy: γ^{d(a)}) and Eq. 2 (goal-directed policy: γ^{d(a)} and γ^{d(j)}) but is not defined in the Parameters section. The Parameters table lists β_I, β_G, α_E, β_E, κ, φ, w_h, and w_τ — no γ. Formulation 2 defines γ=0.9 as 'temporal discount for approach values' but each formulation must be self-contained. This is a clear omission: the equations reference an undefined symbol.

Equations 1 and 2 reference 'Health(a)' and 'Taste(a)' as resource attributes, but the env_spec only provides 'palatability' as a food property. While this is shared across all three formulations and can be resolved by deriving health = 1 - palatability, this derivation is not mentioned anywhere in Formulation 3's text, creating an implicit mapping gap. (Note: Formulations 1 and 2 also require this derivation, but their decision logic sections explicitly describe the mapping context more clearly.)
